name: eng-org
description: 5-role multi-agent engineering org for any project — EM → Tech Leads → Domain Devs → independent Test agents → specialist Reviewer agents, plus a system Architect that produces versioned ADRs before decomposition. /eng-org:init reads your project, detects stack and domains, then sets up tailored agents, slash commands, governance files with 9 binding guardrails, and a portable context layer (AGENTS.md universal entry point, machine-readable eng-org.json manifest, dated DECISIONS.md logs, a multi-project scaffolder, and the /eng-org:graphyfy skill that draws Mermaid linking-graphs of the whole project) so any AI or engineer can pick the project up cold. 0.12.0: Mode L autopilot — an autonomous build-until-done loop with G-9 clarity gate, crash-safe external driver, fingerprint circuit breaker, and an immutable SPEC/acceptance-criteria zone against reward hacking. New in 0.13.0: GR deep-review inside /eng-org:run-reviews — the gr multi-specialist engine reviews the REQ's diff in local-diff mode (gr review --range base..HEAD; any base branch, no GitHub PR, no token, nothing posted), with zero-install auto-resolution of the gr binary (scripts/gr-ensure.sh; no gr-reviewer plugin required, graceful skip when offline), a mandatory TL evidence-verification gate over every GR finding (CONFIRMED/FALSE-POSITIVE/OUT-OF-SCOPE dispositions in gr-review.md, enforced by merge-readiness), and a learning loop that appends every confirmed finding to governance/MISTAKES.md. New in 0.14.0: Tier 1 token-optimization v2 — report diet v2 (verdict-carrying reports capped at ~40-line prose on GREEN/APPROVE, unbounded on RED/BLOCK; evidence paths mandatory in frontmatter; TL forced-sampling audit every REQ; dev-reports/gr-review/em-summary/retro/merge-readiness exempt), incremental fix-iterations v2 (scripts/invalidation.mjs computes transitive-import-closure BFS to pin unaffected tiers as GREEN@<sha> (pinned) with audit trail; reviewer-security/test-regression/G-7/GR always re-run; mistakes_sha256 hash-guards MISTAKES.md staleness), context pack v2 (dedicated context-packer agent authors verbatim tag-sliced extracts per REQ; GUARDRAILS.md always included whole; exclusion manifest mandatory; raw-doc escape hatch logged; rotating canary reviewer reads raw and files pack_audit verdict; test-regression and GR always read raw). New in 0.15.0: review-pipeline hardening + token diet round-2 — mechanical verdict-lint (scripts/verdict-lint.mjs parses every TASK-*-review-*.md, derives the verdict from the max confirmed finding severity, and hard-errors on mismatch in run-reviews + merge-readiness; SKIP-with-note stubs supported), MISTAKES.md learning-loop automation (scripts/mistakes-gate.mjs enforces a dated-heading entry grammar and blocks merge-readiness when a REQ's confirmed findings produced no MISTAKES entry), reviewer fan-out consolidation driven by an empirical overlap audit (new reviewer-governance + reviewer-domain-validator roles; security checks folded into the surviving roster; reviewer-indexes demoted to escalation-only Step 2b), fix-iteration focused re-review (Step 4b re-runs only the reviewers whose findings the fix touched, with explicit RESOLVED/UNRESOLVED re-verdicts per finding), and a quality-neutral token-reduction bundle (agent-file context diet round-2 with byte census, model pins — haiku on context-packer/test-regression with an explicit never-downgrade list — and report-template slimming). Stops at production-ready PR approval — merges and deployment stay human-controlled.
